pkmn.lore: Emerged to give shape to emotion. When the world was still new, it shared feeling with humanity, allowing joy, sorrow, and empathy to take root. Its presence soothes unrest to the gods of time and space.

common.lore: Embodying gratitude and the renewal of life, It moves across barren lands, leaving fields of flowers in its wake and restoring the vitality of nature, bringing growth and bloom to places long abandoned.
